The colors in src\common\dsstats.shared\Units\UnitMap.cs used in src\common\dsstats.weblib\Replays\BuildChart.razor are still bad (e.g. for Terran)
e.g. for Terran we get
Marauder => #518546
Hellion => #46856A
Widow Mine => #818546
Ghost => #5E92AA
Thor => #5EAA89 (and size is medium, should be big)
Medivac => #47743D
Raven => #5EAA89

And we need to use the same colors .\dsstats\src\common\dsstats.weblib\Replays\ReplayBuildComponent.razor
